subcodes.first_line: O noble beloved! Some are of the opinion that love excelleth friendship, and they have thus contended [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حبیب نجیب قومی بر آنند که محبت اعظم از خلت است و استدلال بر این نمودند که
subcodes.subjects: @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture
